title: Börsnestorn om Musk: Det är den stora faran med honom
summary_md:
# Börsnestorn om Musk: Det är den stora faran med honom

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-15  
**Market Sentiment**: Positive

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode centers on a buy recommendation for CellaVision, a Swedish medical-technology company specializing in digital microscopy and AI-driven blood analysis. The hosts argue the stock has been unfairly punished, trading at historically low multiples, and that a temporary inventory issue in its European business (≈45% of revenue) will resolve in H2, supported by ~70% gross margins, 20 years of profitability, market dominance, and a new commercially oriented management team. The view is cautiously bullish on a low-valuation, well-run-business thesis.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 CEVI — CellaVision | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Historically low valuation, well-run profitable business; European inventory issue seen as temporary, recovery expected H2; ~70% gross margins leverage on sales pickup.

#### Reasoning

Analyst Mikael Olsson's buy case rests primarily on a historically low valuation for a well-managed, dominant medtech firm profitable for ~20 years with ~10-12% organic growth. A temporary inventory challenge pressured Q1 (and will hit Q2) European revenue (~45% of sales), but is expected to resolve in H2. ~70% gross margins mean a sales rebound flows strongly to results. New commercially focused CEO and returning chairman, plus new bone-marrow analysis product, support a re-acceleration.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the European inventory/lager problem proves structural rather than temporary
- if H2 recovery fails to materialize
- if Chinese competitor MindRay continues taking share
- if margins stay pressured
- if new management changes strategy negatively

> *"Jag tror att det är en tillfällig dipp... så kan man se en återhämtning i slutet på året. Då betalar man historiskt relativt låga multiplar."*

---
